title: Theme: Family and Relationships
description: Vocabulary for describing family members and relationships.

sentences.spanish: Tengo tres hermanos y una hermana menor.
sentences.english: I have three brothers and one younger sister.

sentences.spanish: Mis abuelos viven en una casa grande en el campo.
sentences.english: My grandparents live in a big house in the countryside.

sentences.spanish: El sobrino de mi esposa es muy inteligente y amable.
sentences.english: My wife's nephew is very smart and kind.

sentences.spanish: Ayer hablé con mis suegros sobre la fiesta de cumpleaños.
sentences.english: Yesterday I talked with my parents-in-law about the birthday party.

sentences.spanish: La boda de mi primo fue el mes pasado.
sentences.english: My cousin's wedding was last month.

hermano.mnemonic: Her man, no! That's my brother!
hermano.explanation: Means 'brother'. 'Hermanos' can mean brothers or siblings.

suegro.mnemonic: Sue-grow. You hope your relationship with your in-laws will grow.

gemelo.mnemonic: Hem-el-o. Hemel sounds like two parts of a hem: 'twin'!
